name: Torta
recipeInstructions:
Beat the egg yolks. Mix with the first three ingredients. Set aside.
Add the yeast to the warm water. Let rise for one minute. Put in flour.
Set aside.
Mix the yolk batter with the yeast batter. Gradually beat in remaining flour and milk. Add anise seeds and extract. Continue beating until elastic and pour into small mold pans lined with parchment paper until doubled in bulk. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven until golden brown. Brush with melted butter and sprinkle with grated cheese and sugar.
Important: Gradually add the remaining flour to the rest of the ingredients. When you have added three cups, if your batter is slightly stiff (but not dry), it's ready. Sometimes the size of the yolks can affect the consistency.
